title: WINTER
technique: Tall white cutout block letters with dotted gray texture, a hairline cyan rule, and a blue dither field.
composition: Centered monumental wordmark over a low horizontal ice/water band with abundant black negative space.
quality: Excellent title restraint: one dominant word, a thin frame line, and a single textured base plane.
summary: Icy monumental lettering: tall white cutout letters over a blue dithered base, framed by black space.
